category_sources: source_facts.description says command driven Spotify player; official README describes a terminal music player.
display_name_sources: Official README title and binary name use spotify_player; source_facts.name is spotify_player.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, features, commands, and configuration documentation; no separate docs site found in official sources.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/aome510/spotify-player, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README lists terminal music player, Spotify Connect, streaming, daemon, and CLI commands; source_facts.executables lists spotify_player.
